arts.ttl: Chelsea star embroiled in Barcelona corruption allegations
arts.sum: Chelsea striker Marc Guiu has found himself unwittingly caught in the crossfire of Barcelona ’s political turmoil that have seen sporting director indirectly accused of corruption at Camp Nou. “We have Marc Guiu, we were struggling financially and we signed Vitor Roque,” Font told RAC1 .
